EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITinSurface2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control TIN surfaces.

[Guid("249CD6B0-8441-42E7-BBE6-2CAE4A1DAC9A")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITinSurface2 : ITinSurface, ISurface, IFunctionalSurface
